metadata.title:
RESCUES train FROM


DEATH IN TUNNEL

pages.raw_text:
A fireman named Abbott of the
Great Northern, travelling as a pass
enger on eastbound train No. 4. prov
ed himself hero yesterday, and as
the price of his heroism was over
come by the deadly gases to which
the passengers and the engine crew
of the train stalled in the Cascade
tunnel had succumbed.


Leaving Skykomish a big "hog"
engine was put on as helper to
make the run over the divide, instead
of the regular engine A defective
coupling pin caused several delays
and finally the train was completely
stalled in the tunnel.


The tunnel rapidly filled with gas
from the engines and the conductor
decided to send the ''helper" to the
station ahead for an additional loco
motive.


After the hog" engine left, the
conductor, realizing that the gas ac-
cumlating. menaced the passengers
lives, started to notify the remaining
crew to drop back out of the tunnel.


When he ciimped up into the cab
both the engineer and firemen were
stretched unconscious on the floor
